function.name: git
function.description: Execute git operations in the workspace repository. Use for all version control tasks: checking status, staging files, committing, viewing diffs, browsing history, managing branches, stashing, etc. Prefer this over the bash tool for any git command.

message.description: A short description of the git operation being performed

command.description: The git subcommand and arguments (e.g. 'status', 'diff HEAD', 'log --oneline -10', 'add src/main.go', 'commit -m "fix: handle edge case"'). Do not include the 'git' prefix.

working_directory.description: Path to the git repository root (or any subdirectory within it)
